name: ai-dev-orchestrator
description: Backend server for the AI Dev Orchestrator — webhook-driven, Claude Code CLI agent orchestration over git worktrees.

scripts.dev: bun run setup && bun --watch run src/index.ts
scripts.start: bun run setup && bun run src/index.ts
scripts.docker:reset: bun run docker:down && rm -rf data repo worktrees
scripts.docker:fresh: bun run docker:reset && docker compose up --build
